prompt: Translate this English proverb into two other languages in a way that preserves the spirit, not the words: 'The best time to plant a tree was twenty years ago. The second best time is now.' Add a one-sentence note on each.
response:
Spanish: "El momento óptimo para plantar un árbol fue hace veinte años. El segundo mejor momento es ahora." Note: This focuses on the idea of planting trees in general, emphasizing the importance of action in the present regardless of missed opportunities in the past.

French: "Le meilleur moment pour planter un arbre fut vingt ans plus tôt. Le deuxième meilleur moment est maintenant." Note: This also highlights the idea of past opportunities, but the sentence structure and emphasis on "moment" convey a sense of urgency in the present.
